articles.value: It's Clobberin' Time with The Thing - Commander Deck Tech
articles.excerpt: From Marvel comics to Commander combat, this deck tech unleashes The Thing as a trampling, counter-doubling threat.
We're making something a little... creative: we're taking a look at the old Izzet Indomitable Creativity deck and porting it to EDH!
Can we build the new Amarant Coral, a Gruul fighting machine, using only Final Fantasy cards. Owain is gonna find out, with this deck tech.

articles.value: The Top 10 Most Played Jund Cards in Commander
articles.excerpt: What are the most played Jund (black, red, and green) cards in Commander? Here's the top 10. Is your favorite on the list?

articles.value: Two-Headed Giant Deck Tech - Mm'menon, Uthros Exile & Szarel, Genesis Shepherd
articles.excerpt: Two-Headed Giant is a quirky but fun format to try out, and Kara's got a pair of decks helmed by Mm'menon, Uthros Exile and Szarel, Genesis Shepherd that are excellent introductions to the format.
